_comment: Robot viewpoints used to capture the eval frames in warehouse_aws_semantic.world (map/world frame; yaw_deg 0 = +X). These are the exact poses the shipped manifest bboxes were labeled from — re-labeling is needed if you capture from different poses. The robot must be STATIONARY when grabbing: either kill the motion nodes (goal_assignment, frontier_detection, bt_navigator, controller_server, behavior_server) and zero /cmd_vel, or grab before Nav2 starts. Teleport with: gz model -m waffle_pi -x X -y Y -z 0.01 -Y <yaw_rad>. Note the waffle_pi camera sits ~10 cm off the ground: a full-height person needs ~4 m of standoff to fit vertically.

chairs_front.description: Looking west: chair_red prominent left (~2.3 m), chair_blue right (~4.2 m), person_standing small at back-centre, box_blue_floor and the sofa corner at the far left edge.

sofa_zone.description: Looking south at ~3 m: sofa_orange centred with box_blue_sofa on its seat, box_red on the floor at the left edge, box_blue_floor distractor at the right edge.

shelf_aisle.description: Looking north-west: ShelfD rack with cardboard clutter fills the top, box_yellow on the floor in front of it (~2.6 m); chair_blue intrudes slightly at the far left edge.

pallet_jack.description: Pallet jack in full side view, straight ahead at 1.6 m against the east wall.

person.description: person_standing full-body at ~4 m in the SW corner, box_blue_floor visible on the left.
